calendar.matters:
Motion For Atty'S Fees
Off Calendar Dec-05-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Marie G. Quashnock, Esq. 408/559-6669 for pltf & opposing party; Richard S.E. Johns, Esq. 781-8494 for deft & moving party.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows:
Attorney fees for trial $5,000.00; opening brief on appeal $9,000.00; reply brief $5,000.00; miscellaneous fees re appeal/administrative $2,000.00; miscellaneous costs not part of cost bill $1,000.00; total award of attorney fees $22,000.00.
Acceptable by both parties, therefore the Court adopts its tentative ruling above. Deft to prepare order.
